name: Future FinTech Group Inc.
summary: Future FinTech Group Inc. is a Florida holding company primarily engaged in supply-chain financing services and trading in China. Historically a fruit juice manufacturer in the PRC, it transitioned to financial technology services including asset management in Hong Kong, cross-border money transfer in the UK, brokerage and investment banking in Hong Kong, and cryptocurrency mining in the U.S. Most non-China operations have been divested or dissolved as of late 2024.

products.name: Supply Chain Financing Services
products.description: Supply-chain financing and trading services operated in China.

products.name: Asset Management (NTAM)
products.description: Asset management business in Hong Kong through Nice Talent Asset Management Limited, sold in November 2024.

products.name: Cross-Border Money Transfer
products.description: Cross-border money transfer service operated in the UK through FTFT UK Limited and DigiPay FinTech Limited, divested December 2024.

products.name: Brokerage and Investment Banking
products.description: Brokerage and investment banking business in Hong Kong, divested December 2024.

products.name: Cryptocurrency Mining
products.description: Cryptocurrency mining farm operated in the U.S. through FTFT SuperComputing Inc., sold December 2024.

products.name: Fruit Juice Concentrates and Beverages
products.description: Historical production and sale of fruit juice concentrates, purees, and beverages in the PRC, now discontinued.
